This is essentially the complete solution specification, not just a description of what's broken.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_monorepo_sets_packagemanager_for_bun through test_comment_updated) are ALL pure text-matching: they read the source file and check for string patterns like 'if (isMonorepo)' in content, 'packageJson.packageManager =' in content, etc. None of them import, call, or execute the actual code. The pass-to-pass tests do run subprocesses, but all f2p tests are string-in-file checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Since all f2p tests are string-matching against source code, an agent could satisfy them by simply inserting the expected strings as comments or dead code without actually implementing the fix. For example, adding a comment containing 'Monorepo templates use turbo which requires packageManager' and 'async function getPackageManagerVersion' as a no-op function would pass the f2p tests without fixing the bug.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction says 'Monorepo with bun/npm/yarn sets packageManager to the detected version' and 'Non-monorepo projects still have packageManager stripped' as behavioral requirements. The tests only check for string patterns in source code, not actual runtime behavior with different package managers. The bun@1.2.0 test in the scaffold test is only verified indirectly via test_repo_shadcn_scaffold_tests pass-to-pass test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly grouped with section comments (FAIL-TO-PASS, PASS-TO-PASS, STRUCTURAL) and have descriptive names and docstrings explaining what each test verifies.

structured_data_schema.reason: The task does not produce structured data output like JSON/CSV/API/DB schemas.

no_typos.reason: No apparent typos in filenames, paths, commands, or variable names in the instruction or test files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction explicitly names the function 'adaptWorkspaceConfig', tells exactly where to look, what to add (helper function for version detection), the exact conditional logic structure (check pnpm-workspace.yaml), and the exact fallback format (<manager>@*). This goes beyond identifying the buggy area into specifying the implementation.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
